page: Amazon Web Services m8gd.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an AWS Graviton ARMv9 processor using the Neoverse-V2 microarchitecture. It features 16 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.8 GHz, with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 950 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong memory subsystem performance, with the Passmark memory score ranking in the top tier (top 10%). Large-block read-only and write-only memory bandwidth tests both placed in the top 25%. In CPU-bound tasks, the instance achieved strong (top 25%) results in Geekbench single-core and multi-core tests, as well as single- and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. However, standard stress-ng CPU tests, software compilation, and static web serving throughput fell within the average (middle 50%) range.

While the instance demonstrates strong database operation performance, placing in the top 25% in Passmark database benchmarks, it exhibits performance tradeoffs in specific workloads. Large language model inference using a medium 7B model resulted in weak (bottom 25%) prompt processing speeds, though text generation remained average. Given the combination of dedicated ARMv9 cores, high-speed local NVMe SSD storage, and strong memory bandwidth, this instance is suited for database operations, text processing, and general-purpose workloads requiring local scratch space.
description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated ARMv9 physical cores (AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2) running at 2.8 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM and 950 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Benchmark results highlight a top-tier (top 10%) Passmark memory score and strong (top 25%) large-block memory bandwidth and Geekbench scores. However, it exhibits a performance tradeoff in medium-sized LLM prompt processing, which falls into the bottom 25%. This instance is suited for database operations, text processing, and general-purpose applications requiring high memory bandwidth and local storage.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 ARMv9 cores, 64 GB RAM, and 950 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier memory performance and strong database capabilities.

tagline: An ARMv9-powered general-purpose instance featuring dedicated cores, integrated NVMe SSD storage, and top-tier memory bandwidth performance.

64.0 GB of system memory and 950 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier (top 10%) Passmark memory score and strong large-block memory bandwidth
Strong database operations and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance
Tradeoff in medium (7B) LLM prompt processing speed (bottom 25%)
Suited for database workloads, text processing, and general-purpose computing
